caption: A person’s hands are shown opening a collectibles box on a black surface with a red "SPY" logo. The box is black with green accents and features the text "OBSIDIAN" and "2 AUTOGRAPHS!". The person carefully slides a card out of a protective sleeve inside the box. The card appears to have a blue and gold design. Across the frames, the card is progressively removed from the packaging. A small inset video window shows a man with a beard wearing a black hoodie watching the process. On-screen text includes "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM". The scene transitions from the initial opening of the box to the moment the card is fully revealed and held by the person's fingers.
